architecture_notes.main_engine: run_forever.py — AutoTraderEngine v5.1 OMEGA, single autonomous class
architecture_notes.acceptance_rules: 7/7 OMEGA checks: trades≥15, WR≥90%best, RRR≥1.0, DD<8%, PF>1.3, no_overfit, E>best+MC>65%
architecture_notes.scheduler: Built into run_forever.py (30min/2h/6h/24h + UTC time-of-day tasks)
architecture_notes.mt5: core/mt5_connector.py ready, simulation mode until live credentials added
architecture_notes.expectancy_engine: analytics/expectancy_engine.py — rolling E tracking per pair
architecture_notes.portfolio_engine: portfolio/portfolio_engine.py — wraps LiveExposureEngine, 3R cap, FTMO check
architecture_notes.sqlite: data/autotrader.db — 6 tables (trades, events, performance_daily, evolution, resource, pair_personality)
architecture_notes.live_execution_guard: execution/live_execution_guard.py — duplicate prevention, MT5 reconciliation, retry×3
architecture_notes.live_drift_monitor: analytics/live_drift_monitor.py — evaluates all pairs every 2h, halves risk on drift >15pp
architecture_notes.live_exposure_engine: portfolio/live_exposure_engine.py — cluster conflict + USD cap + inverse pair warnings
architecture_notes.walk_forward_validator: validation/walk_forward_validator.py — OOS validation every 6h, MC survival ≥70%
architecture_notes.paper_trading: execution/paper_trading.py — mandatory paper phase, live gate after 14 days + 20 trades
architecture_notes.resource_monitor: core/resource_monitor.py — warns at 6GB, purges at 7GB, emergency at 7.5GB
architecture_notes.mt5_demo_setup: scripts/setup_mt5_demo.py — auto-install + demo connection + paper mode enforcement
